name: Ssh_KexInitMessage
description: Ssh_KexInitMessage schema from Censys Platform API

client_to_server_ciphers.description: A list of ssh cipher algorithm identifiers, named according to section 6 of https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4251.txt; see https://www.iana.org/assignments/ssh-parameters/ssh-parameters.xhtml#ssh-parameters-16 for standard values.

client_to_server_compression.description: A list of ssh compression algorithm identifiers, named according to section 6 of https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4251.txt; see https://www.iana.org/assignments/ssh-parameters/ssh-parameters.xhtml#ssh-parameters-20 for standard values.

client_to_server_languages.description: A name-list of language tags in order of preference. As Defined in https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3066.txt.

client_to_server_macs.description: A list of ssh MAC algorithm identifiers, named according to section 6 of https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4251.txt; see https://www.iana.org/assignments/ssh-parameters/ssh-parameters.xhtml#ssh-parameters-18 for standard values.

host_key_algorithms.description: Asymmetric key algorithms for the host key supported by the client.

kex_algorithms.description: Key exchange algorithms used in the handshake.

server_to_client_ciphers.description: A list of ssh cipher algorithm identifiers, named according to section 6 of https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4251.txt; see https://www.iana.org/assignments/ssh-parameters/ssh-parameters.xhtml#ssh-parameters-16 for standard values.

server_to_client_compression.description: A list of ssh compression algorithm identifiers, named according to section 6 of https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4251.txt; see https://www.iana.org/assignments/ssh-parameters/ssh-parameters.xhtml#ssh-parameters-20 for standard values.

server_to_client_languages.description: A name-list of language tags in order of preference. As Defined in https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3066.txt.

server_to_client_macs.description: A list of ssh MAC algorithm identifiers, named according to section 6 of https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4251.txt; see https://www.iana.org/assignments/ssh-parameters/ssh-parameters.xhtml#ssh-parameters-18 for standard values.
